title: Nursery Rhyme. XXI. Historical
content:
Hector Protector was dressed all in green;
        Hector Protector was sent to the Queen.
        The Queen did not like him,
        Nor more did the King:
        So Hector Protector was sent back again.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. XXI. Historical", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
